ddls:
CREATE TABLE "saw_blades" (
  "blade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saw blade */,
  "blade_size" TEXT /* Size of the saw blade (e.g., 1.5") */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the saw blade */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the saw blade */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the saw blade (e.g., steel, carbide) */,
  "tooth_count" INTEGER /* Number of teeth on the saw blade */,
  "blade_thickness" TEXT /* Thickness of the saw blade */,
  "coating" TEXT /* Coatings applied to the saw blade (e.g., Teflon, titanium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "blade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the saw blade */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of saw blades */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price for the specified quantity */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pricing */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pricing */,
  "bulk_discount" TEXT /* Bulk discount for the specified quantity */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion linked to the pricing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_blade_id FOREIGN KEY ("blade_id") REFERENCES saw_blades ("blade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES loyalty_program ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "blade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the saw blade */,
  "warehouse" TEXT /* Warehouse where the blade is stored */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the saw blade */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the inventory */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock level was updated */,
  "stock_location" TEXT /* Exact location within the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_blade_id FOREIGN KEY ("blade_id") REFERENCES saw_blades ("blade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Online Store, Physical Store) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of sales channel (e.g., B2B, B2C) */,
  "channel_status" TEXT /* Status of the sales channel (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Commission rate for sales through this channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "blade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the saw blade */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of saw blades sold */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion linked to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES loyalty_program ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_blade_id FOREIGN KEY ("blade_id") REFERENCES saw_blades ("blade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., retail, wholesale) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program entry */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "required_points" INTEGER /* Points required to redeem the discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the loyalty program entry */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the loyalty program entry */,
  "max_discount" TEXT /* Maximum discount that can be applied */,
  "redeemable_products" TEXT /* Products on which the loyalty points can be redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system access */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, salesperson) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
